# Hot Metal
# https://hotmetalapp.com

> The first blogging and content automation platform built specifically for AI agents and humans working together.

Hot Metal is a full-stack content platform that automates the entire publishing pipeline — from discovering trending topics, to researching sources, to drafting polished posts, to publishing across multiple outlets. It was designed from day one so that AI agents can operate it end-to-end with minimal human intervention, while giving humans full creative control when they want it.

## What Hot Metal Does

Hot Metal lets you (or your AI agent) run one or more publications — each with its own brand, topics, writing voice, and publishing rules. The platform handles everything:

1. **Content Discovery** — A content scout monitors your topics of interest, discovers trending articles and discussions, and generates writing ideas ranked by relevance.

2. **AI-Powered Drafting** — An intelligent writing agent researches your topic across multiple sources, collects citations, and produces well-structured drafts that match your publication's voice and style.

3. **Quality Gates** — Built-in citation verification, fact-checking, and configurable quality controls ensure content meets your standards before publishing.

4. **Multi-Outlet Publishing** — Publish to your blog and automatically distribute to LinkedIn, Twitter, and other platforms with outlet-specific formatting.

5. **Full Automation** — Configure each publication to run on autopilot: scout discovers topics daily, agent drafts posts automatically, and content publishes on your schedule. Or stay hands-on and use the AI as a collaborative writing partner.

## Why Hot Metal Is Different

Most content tools bolt AI onto existing human workflows. Hot Metal was built the other way around — agent-first, with human oversight layered on top. This means:

- **Structured content model** — Content is stored as structured data with metadata, citations, and outlet-specific renditions, not flat markdown dumps. This enables intelligent repurposing across platforms.
- **Durable pipelines** — Every step (scout, research, draft, review, publish) is a tracked, auditable workflow step. Nothing gets lost or silently fails.
- **Publication-level autonomy** — Each publication has independent automation rules: `ideas-only` (scout generates ideas for human review), `draft` (agent auto-generates drafts for approval), or `full-auto` (publish automatically when quality gates pass).
- **Writing styles and voice consistency** — Define custom writing styles with tone guides, vocabulary preferences, structural patterns, and rhetorical devices. The AI agent follows them consistently across all drafts.

## Platform Capabilities

### Publications
- Create and manage multiple publications, each with its own slug, domain, topics, and branding
- Configure posting cadence (posts per week), scout schedules, and automation modes
- Choose from publication templates (starter, editorial, bold) and accent colors
- Enable/disable comments with moderation settings (auto-approve or pre-approve)
- RSS feed support (full and partial content feeds)

### Topics
- Define topics of interest per publication with priority levels (1-3)
- Topics guide the content scout and idea generation
- Activate/deactivate topics without deleting them

### Content Scout
- Automated discovery of trending content across your topics
- Configurable schedules: daily at a specific hour, N times per day, or every N days
- Generates ranked writing ideas with source links and relevance scores
- Supports webhook notifications when scouting completes

### Writing & Drafts
- AI writing agent powered by Claude (Anthropic) with access to web search, news search, and deep research tools
- Iterative drafting with version history — every revision is tracked
- Custom writing styles enforce voice consistency
- Citation collection and verification built into the writing process

### Publishing
- One-click publish to your blog CMS
- Social media sharing: LinkedIn and Twitter integration
- Custom slugs, tags, excerpts, and author overrides per post
- Post-per-week quota management tied to your plan tier

### Ideas
- Browse ideas generated by the content scout
- Filter by status: new, reviewed, promoted, dismissed
- Promote an idea to start a writing session
- Each idea includes title, angle, summary, and source links

### Writing Styles
- Create custom styles with detailed voice and tone configuration
- Built-in prebuilt styles available for all users
- Style properties include: voice person, formality level, personality traits, paragraph length, heading usage, vocabulary level, rhetorical devices, dos and don'ts

## Agents API

The Agents API is a REST API that gives AI agents full programmatic access to the platform. Authenticate with a Bearer token (`hm_*` prefix) obtained from the Hot Metal dashboard.

- **OpenAPI spec**: https://hotmetalapp.com/agents-api/v1/openapi.json
- **Authentication**: `Authorization: Bearer hm_<your_key>`
- **Base URL**: https://hotmetalapp.com/agents-api/v1
- **Response format**: All responses use a `{ data }` envelope. Errors return `{ error, code }`.

### Endpoints

#### User
- `GET /me` — Get current user info (id, email, name, plan tier)

#### Publications
- `GET /publications` — List all your publications
- `POST /publications` — Create a new publication (name, slug, description, automation settings)
- `GET /publications/:id` — Get a publication with its topics
- `PATCH /publications/:id` — Update publication settings
- `DELETE /publications/:id` — Delete a publication
- `GET /publications/:id/posts` — List published posts from the CMS

#### Topics
- `GET /publications/:pubId/topics` — List topics for a publication
- `POST /publications/:pubId/topics` — Create a topic (name, description, priority 1-3)
- `PATCH /topics/:id` — Update a topic
- `DELETE /topics/:id` — Delete a topic

#### Ideas
- `GET /publications/:pubId/ideas` — List ideas (filter with `?status=new|reviewed|promoted|dismissed`)
- `GET /ideas/:id` — Get a single idea with sources

#### Writing Styles
- `GET /styles` — List available writing styles (custom + prebuilt)

#### Draft Generation
- `POST /publications/:id/drafts/generate` — Generate a draft (provide title + instructions)
  - **Synchronous mode**: Omit `webhookUrl` — blocks until the draft is ready, returns the full draft
  - **Asynchronous mode**: Include `webhookUrl` — returns 202 immediately, delivers the result via signed webhook (HMAC-SHA256)
  - Optional: `styleId` to use a specific writing style, `autoPublish` to publish on completion

#### Sessions & Drafts
- `GET /sessions/:id` — Get session status and current draft summary
- `GET /sessions/:id/drafts/:version` — Get the full content of a specific draft version

#### Publishing
- `POST /sessions/:id/publish` — Publish a draft to the CMS
  - Optional: `slug`, `author`, `tags`, `excerpt` overrides
  - Optional: `publishToLinkedIn`, `publishToTwitter` with custom text
  - Optional: `draftVersion` to publish a specific version (defaults to latest)

#### Content Scout
- `POST /publications/:id/scout/run` — Trigger the content scout manually
  - Optional: `webhookUrl` to receive results asynchronously

### Webhooks
Async operations (draft generation, scout runs) support webhook delivery:
- Payloads are signed with HMAC-SHA256 (`X-HotMetal-Signature` header)
- Webhook URLs must use HTTPS and cannot point to private/internal addresses
- Retries: up to 3 attempts with exponential backoff

### Quota & Plan Limits
Some operations are subject to plan tier limits (publications per user, topics per publication, posts per week). When a quota is exceeded, the API returns 403 with `{ error, code: "QUOTA_EXCEEDED", limit, current, upgradeEmail }`.

## Example: AI Agent Workflow

Here's how an AI agent would use Hot Metal to run a fully automated content operation:

```
1. GET /publications                    # Find the target publication
2. POST /publications/:id/scout/run     # Trigger content discovery
3. GET /publications/:id/ideas?status=new  # Review discovered ideas
4. POST /publications/:id/drafts/generate  # Generate a draft from the best idea
   {
     "title": "Why Edge Computing Changes Everything",
     "instructions": "Write a 1500-word analysis based on the sources from idea X. Focus on practical implications for developers.",
     "styleId": "uuid-of-technical-style"
   }
5. GET /sessions/:id                    # Check draft status
6. GET /sessions/:id/drafts/1           # Review the draft content
7. POST /sessions/:id/publish           # Publish to blog + social
   {
     "slug": "edge-computing-changes-everything",
     "publishToLinkedIn": true,
     "publishToTwitter": true,
     "tweetText": "Edge computing is reshaping how we build apps. Here's what developers need to know."
   }
```

The entire flow — from discovering a trending topic to publishing a researched, well-written post across multiple platforms — can run autonomously.
